ebook_title: Sleep & Recovery for Real Hormonal Output
notes: Disclaimer in ebook: 'This is not medical advice. I am just sharing my experience with how I fixed and increased my sleep so I could recover better from intense training and perform at my best cognitive level.'
Disclaimer in ebook: 'This entire book is my opinion + experience. I'm not your doctor, I'm not your dad. Use this as a blueprint to test things, not as a religion.'
Primary source on 5-alpha-reductase, DHT optimization, 21 suppressors, 28 enhancement levers, and advanced DHT stacks (Protocols 16–24).

ebook_title: The Metabolic & Hormonal Truth About Hair Loss
notes: Argues DHT is not the primary cause of hair loss. Metabolic context hypothesis — follicle energy insufficiency is the root cause.
Author notes having more extensive documents on improving individual markers available separately. Covers comprehensive panel interpretation, optimal ranges, patterns.
Primary source on pre/intra/post-workout nutrition, fuel partitioning, GLUT4, glycogen, and performance supplements (R-ALA, HMB, Taurine, L-Carnitine).
